summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CORtracker Ticketing System feature. All backend APIs (29 tests) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in ticket comments endpoint. Employee can create tickets with all 7 categories and 4 priority levels. Admin can view all tickets, update status/priority/assignment, add comments (including internal notes), and view statistics.

fixed.fix: Added comment_doc.pop('_id', None) before returning response

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: All ticket CRUD operations properly implemented with role-based access control
Backend: SLA calculation working correctly (URGENT=4h, HIGH=8h, MEDIUM=24h, LOW=72h)
Backend: Internal notes properly hidden from employees in comments endpoint
Frontend: Employee tickets page has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Frontend: Admin tickets page has comprehensive filtering (status, category, priority, assigned to me)
Frontend: Multi-admin assignment working via multi-select dropdown
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed MongoDB _id serialization in add_ticket_comment function
seed_data_creation: Created test tickets during testing (prefixed with TEST_), cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ticketing System feature fully tested and working. Key test points verified: 1) POST /api/tickets creates ticket with auto-generated ticket number (TKT-YYYYMMDD-XXXX), 2) All 7 categories supported (IT_SUPPORT, HR, PAYROLL, FACILITIES, TIME_ATTENDANCE, BENEFITS, OTHER), 3) All 4 priorities supported (LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, URGENT) with SLA calculation, 4) GET /api/tickets returns employee's own tickets or all tickets for admin, 5) PUT /api/tickets/{id} allows admin to update status/priority/assignment/category, 6) POST /api/tickets/{id}/comments adds comments with internal note support for admins, 7) GET /api/admin/tickets/stats returns comprehensive statistics, 8) Employee UI: New Ticket button, category selection grid, subject/description/priority form, ticket list with status badges, 9) Admin UI: Stats cards (Active, Unassigned, SLA Breached, Urgent/High, Resolved), filters, ticket detail panel with status/priority/assignment controls, comment section with internal note checkbox

backend_ticket_creation.details: POST /api/tickets creates ticket with all required fields, auto-generates ticket number, calculates SLA

backend_ticket_retrieval.details: GET /api/tickets returns filtered results, employees see own tickets, admins see all

backend_ticket_update.details: PUT /api/tickets/{id} allows admin to update status, priority, assignment, category

backend_ticket_comments.details: POST/GET /api/tickets/{id}/comments working, internal notes hidden from employees

backend_admin_stats.details: GET /api/admin/tickets/stats returns by_status, active_total, sla_breached, unassigned, by_category, by_priority

frontend_employee_tickets_page.details: Support Tickets link in sidebar, stats cards, search/filter, New Ticket button, ticket list

frontend_employee_ticket_creation.details: Category grid (7 options), subject/description inputs, priority buttons, Submit button

frontend_admin_tickets_page.details: Stats cards (5), search/filters (status, category, priority), Assigned to me checkbox, ticket list

frontend_admin_ticket_detail.details: Status/priority dropdowns, multi-admin assignment, SLA info, creator info, comments with internal note option

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/tickets: PASS - Creates ticket with all fields, auto-generates ticket number
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/tickets: PASS - Returns filtered tickets based on role and query params
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/tickets/{id}: PASS - Returns specific ticket with comment count
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/tickets/{id}/comments: PASS - Adds comment, supports internal notes for admins
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/tickets/{id}/comments: PASS - Returns comments, hides internal notes from employees
